title: Easy Road Roller Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Road Roller Steamroller Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Enjoy this simple road roller coloring page for toddlers. Bold borders and large open coloring zones. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The smooth drum of the road roller ensures the asphalt is perfectly flat for safe, high-speed vehicle travel.
road rollers are compactor vehicles that use heavy steel drums to flatten and compress soil, concrete, and asphalt for highways.
